executives.name: Edwin Gillis
executives.background: Edwin J. Gillis has been a director since 2006. He was formerly the CFO of Veritas Software Corporation and CFO of PTC Inc.

executives.name: Yvette Kanouff
executives.background: Partner and Chief Technology Officer at JC2 Ventures. Former Senior Vice President and General Manager of the Service Provider Business at Cisco Systems.
